creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Wilke from comment #5)

You have to use PGSQL <= 9.4 for postgis 2.1

http://trac.osgeo.org/postgis/wiki/UsersWikiPostgreSQLPostGIS

I have proposed a framework for PostGis for solve this problem: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=213038
